sourceMovie.title: Braven
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: Braven works as a drama movie with a point of view—fans quote moments, but they also argue about what the film is actually saying about power, desire, or survival. The drama and action blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: Sweet Girl
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Braven clicked for you, Sweet Girl (2021) is a strong next stop: both trade in drama and action, with momentum and clean stakes. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

recommendations.title: The Substitute
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Braven clicked for you, The Substitute (1996) is a strong next stop: both trade in drama and action, with unease that lingers after the credits. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Braven?
faq.answer: Try Sweet Girl, The Substitute, Homefront—each shares DNA with Braven while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Braven?
faq.answer: Braven (2018) is best described as Drama, Action, Thriller. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Braven worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 6.2/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this drama lane.
